area: Team lifecycle verbs / lease error context
finding: `team lease` on an already-held exclusive permission returns `ATM_TEAM_LEASE_CONFLICT` without naming the current holder, and `team release` with a non-holder actor returns `ATM_TEAM_LEASE_NOT_FOUND` without listing active leases, forcing the operator to read the team-run JSON manually.
expectedBehavior: Lease conflict and not-found errors should include the current holder agentId, leased paths, and the exact release invocation for the real holder.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by asserting the live `team lease`/`team release` lifecycle error envelopes include `currentOwner`, `currentOwnerPaths`, active holder summaries, and the copyable holder release command. Validator: `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case team-lifecycle-verbs`.
